[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000 2
1 1011110 5
2 1101111 6
3 1011110 5
4 1111111 a
5 1011101 5
6 0111101 5
7 1111111 a

01 10 1111111 a match 4 7
12 21 1111111 a match 4 7

70 07 1111110 6

37 73 0110000 2 match 0
